message: Node started: Implement the main.py script based on the strategy provided by the geometry_strategist. The script must: 1. Read N and the N lines of xi, yi, ri from stdin. 2. Implement the non-overlapping rectangle generation logic. 3. Ensure every rectangle [x1, x2) x [y1, y2) contains (xi, yi) and stays within [0, 10000). 4. Print exactly N lines of x1 y1 x2 y2 to stdout. Ensure the code is clean, efficient, and follows the submission contract strictly.
